steps.title: Notice the balanced view
steps.content: The previous sentence says scholars recognize both the economic sustainability of worker cooperatives and the model's challenges. The next sentence describes experts who ignore one side of that balanced view.

steps.title: Introduce the lost nuance
steps.content: B shifts to how challenges might be overcome, which the sentence does not discuss. C makes a generic claim about solutions. D says scholars are skeptical of the model's viability, contradicting the previous statement that many scholars testify to its sustainability. The remaining transition points to experts overlooking nuance. The answer is A.
